use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING [A] HUMAN SUFFERING FROM DEPRESSION
METHOD OF TREATING ANXIETY RELATED DISORDERS INCLUDING OBSESSIVE COMPULSIVE DISORDER
METHOD OF TREATING PSYCHIATRIC SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH PREMENSTRUAL DISORDERS USING SERTRALINE
METHOD OF TREATMENT OF LATE LUTEAL PHASE DYSPHORIC DISORDER (PMDD) USING SERTRALINE

indications.text:
Major Depressive Disorder–ZOLOFT (sertraline hydrochloride) is indicated for the treatment
of major depressive disorder in adults.
The efficacy of ZOLOFT in the treatment of a major depressive episode was established in six to
eight week controlled trials of adult outpatients whose diagnoses corresp...

Major Depressive Disorder–ZOLOFT (sertraline hydrochloride) is indicated for the treatment
of major depressive disorder in adults.
The efficacy of ZOLOFT in the treatment of a major depressive episode was established in six to
eight week controlled trials of adult outpatients whose diagnoses corresp...

ZOLOFT is indicated for the treatment of the following [See Clinical Studies (14)]:
• Major depressive disorder (MDD)
• Obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD)
• Panic disorder (PD)
• Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD)
• Social anxiety disorder (SAD)
• Premenstrual dysphoric disorder (PMDD)
